title: Communihub vs Updates

posts.author: mchinsky (Mark Chinsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
As we know, Communihub is like a ‘separate’ world from Updates. But yet it has much better email integration than Updates.

I wish there was some way when an update or email is logged in Communihub that there would be some information or reference to it in regular updates so I can see everything in one place.

Communihub doesn’t update the ‘new update’ balloon so there is no real way to know what’s going on relative to Communihub when looking at rows on a board.

Any thoughts or suggestions or changes coming soon?

posts.author: gcKen (Kenneth Obel)
posts.cookedHtml: Amen to this! Communihub is a good idea, but it’s like, if a tree falls in the forest… How do we even know if a message comes in, without checking the communihub in every task/item? It’s nuts! Is there no “hub” in the communihub?
